parameters.name: Calendar id
parameters.description: Select a calendar

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: Select an event

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: The Event's unique identifier

parameters.name: Body preview
parameters.description: The preview of the message associated with the event

parameters.name: Categories
parameters.description: The categories associated with the event

parameters.name: Change key
parameters.description: This property identifies the version of the event object. Every time the event is changed, ChangeKey changes as well.

parameters.name: Created time
parameters.description: The date and time that the event was created

parameters.name: Last modified time
parameters.description: The date and time that the event was last modified

parameters.name: End time
parameters.description: The end time of the event

parameters.name: End time zone
parameters.description: This property specifies the time zone of the meeting end time. The value must be as defined in Windows (example: 'Pacific Standard Time').

parameters.name: Has attachments?
parameters.description: Set to true if the event has attachments

parameters.name: Event Unique ID
parameters.description: A unique identifier that is shared by all instances of an event across different calendars

parameters.name: Importance
parameters.description: The importance of the event: Low, Normal, or High

parameters.name: Is all day event?
parameters.description: Set to true if the event lasts all day

parameters.name: Is cancelled?
parameters.description: Set to true if the event has been canceled

parameters.name: Is Organizer
parameters.description: Set to true if the message sender is also the organizer

parameters.name: Reminder
parameters.description: Time in minutes before event start to remind

parameters.name: Response requested
parameters.description: Set to true if the sender would like a response when the event is accepted or declined

parameters.name: Series master id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for Series Master event type

parameters.name: Show as
parameters.description: Shows as free or busy

parameters.name: Start time
parameters.description: The start time of the event

parameters.name: Start time zone
parameters.description: This property specifies the time zone of the meeting start time. The value must be as defined in Windows (example: 'Pacific Standard Time').

parameters.name: Subject
parameters.description: Event subject

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: The event type: Single Instance, Occurrence, Exception, or Series Master

parameters.name: Web link
parameters.description: The preview of the message associated with the event

parameters.name: Reason
parameters.description: The reason property used by O365 sync events protocol, will be 'deleted' if its a deleted event.

returns.raw:
Connector specific calendar event model class for the backend
- Body
- CalendarEventBackend

parameters.name: Folder
parameters.description: Mail folder to retrieve emails from (default: 'Inbox').

parameters.name: Fetch Only Unread Messages
parameters.description: Retrieve only unread emails?.

parameters.name: Folder
parameters.description: Mail folder to retrieve emails from (default: 'Inbox').

parameters.name: To
parameters.description: Recipient email addresses separated by semicolons (If any match, the trigger will run).

parameters.name: CC
parameters.description: CC recipient email addresses separated by semicolons (If any match, the trigger will run).

parameters.name: To or CC
parameters.description: To or CC recipient email addresses separated by semicolons (If any match, the trigger will run).

parameters.name: From
parameters.description: Sender email addresses separated by semicolons (If any match, the trigger will run).

parameters.name: Importance
parameters.description: Importance of the email (Any, High, Normal, Low).

parameters.name: Only with Attachments
parameters.description: If set to true, only emails with an attachment will be retrieved. Emails without any attachments will be skipped. If set to false, all emails will be retrieved.

parameters.name: Subject Filter
parameters.description: String to look for in the subject line.

parameters.name: Fetch Only Unread Messages
parameters.description: Retrieve only unread emails?.

parameters.name: Include Attachments
parameters.description: If set to true, attachments content will also be retrieved along with the email.

parameters.name: Search Query
parameters.description: Search query to filter emails. How to use '$search' parameter please refer to: https://docs.microsoft.com/previous-versions/office/office-365-api/api/version-2.0/complex-types-for-mail-contacts-calendar#search-requests.

parameters.name: Top
parameters.description: Number of emails to retrieve (default: 10).

returns.raw:
Represents a wrapper object for batch response
- Body
- BatchResponse[ClientReceiveMessage]

parameters.name: Show HTML confirmation dialog
parameters.description: If set to Yes then a dialog wil be shown to confirm selected option of HTML message

parameters.name: Calendar id
parameters.description: Select a calendar

parameters.name: Filter Query
parameters.description: An ODATA filter query to restrict the entries returned (e.g. stringColumn eq 'string' OR numberColumn lt 123).

parameters.name: Order By
parameters.description: An ODATA orderBy query for specifying the order of entries.

parameters.name: Top Count
parameters.description: Total number of entries to retrieve (default = all).

parameters.name: Skip Count
parameters.description: The number of entries to skip (default = 0).

Entity list response
- Body

parameters.name: Calendar id
parameters.description: Select a calendar

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: Select an event

parameters.name: Subject
parameters.description: Event subject

parameters.name: Start time
parameters.description: Start time of the event (example: '2016-11-01T14:30:00Z')

parameters.name: End time
parameters.description: End time of the event (example: '2016-11-01T15:30:00Z')

parameters.name: Time zone
parameters.description: Time zone of the event

parameters.name: Required attendees
parameters.description: Required attendees for the event separated by semicolons

parameters.name: Optional attendees
parameters.description: Optional attendees for the event separated by semicolons

parameters.name: Resource attendees
parameters.description: Resource attendees for the event separated by semicolons

parameters.name: Body
parameters.description: Body of the message associated with the event

parameters.name: Is HTML
parameters.description: Set to true if the body is Html

parameters.name: Location
parameters.description: Location of the event

parameters.name: Importance
parameters.description: The importance of the event: Low, Normal, or High

parameters.name: Is all day event?
parameters.description: Set to true if the event lasts all day

parameters.name: Recurrence
parameters.description: The recurrence pattern for the event

parameters.name: Recurrence end time
parameters.description: End time of the recurrence

parameters.name: Number of occurrences
parameters.description: How many times to repeat the event

parameters.name: Reminder
parameters.description: Time in minutes before event start to remind

parameters.name: Show as
parameters.description: Status to show during the event

parameters.name: Response requested
parameters.description: Set to true if the sender would like a response when the event is accepted or declined

returns.raw:
Connector specific calendar event model class for the client
- Body
